race.name: GFNY Bahamas
race.tagline: Ride through paradise on a flat and fast Caribbean course.

vitals.location: West Bay Street near Goodman's Bay Park, Nassau, New Providence Island, The Bahamas
vitals.location_badge: West Bay Street near Goodman's Bay Park, The Bahamas

climate.description: Tropical Caribbean climate with warm temperatures and potential wind; specific averages unavailable.
challenges: Tropical Caribbean climate with warm temperatures and potential wind

features: Flat and fast course with moderate climbing on paved roads through western New Providence Island

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 64. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 61.

course_description.character: Flat and fast loops through western New Providence with Caribbean beach views; two loops for long route.
course_description.signature_challenge: Wind on flat coastal roads testing endurance.

logistics.lodging_strategy: Nassau offers hotels, resorts near start; details sparse.
logistics.transport: Start/finish at Goodman's Bay Park; group rides during race week.

history.origin_story: Founded 2024 as GFNY expansion; inaugural on 2024: November 3.
notable_moments: Italians (2024 GFNY Worlds champs) dominate windy inaugural.

biased_opinion.summary: GFNY Bahamas delivers a dreamy Caribbean escape with flat speed and stunning views, perfect for a fun GFNY entry without gravel grind—pure vacation vibes on two wheels.

final_verdict.one_liner: Flat-fast paradise ride in Nassau's turquoise playground.
final_verdict.should_you_race: Inaugural success with world champs signals promise; ideal for scenic endurance without suffering.

citations.label: GFNY comes to The Bahamas this November 3rd
Italians win first ever mass participation cycling race in The Bahamas
